Container.Name: StockAnalyzer
Container.Overview: AI-assisted stock portfolio analyser. Reads holdings from Trading 212, fetches live market data, and uses Claude to generate Buy/Hold/Sell recommendations with price targets, sentiment, catalysts and 90-day outlook. Runs on a schedule (Mon/Wed/Sat by default) and stores history in SQLite.
Container.Requires: Claude subscription (Pro or Max). After first start run: docker exec -it StockAnalyzer claude login

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port the dashboard is served on. Access via http://[UnraidIP]:8765

Config.Name: Data directory
Config.Description: App data root (db, reports, stocks, logs, backups). The logs/ subfolder is created automatically on first start — no extra mapping needed.

Config.Name: Backups directory
Config.Description: Where nightly backups are written. Point this at your main array for parity protection. Backups are enabled automatically when this volume is mounted — leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: Claude credentials
Config.Description: Persistent folder for Claude login credentials. After first start, run: docker exec -it StockAnalyzer claude login — then follow the browser link.

Config.Name: Obsidian vault
Config.Description: Host path to your Obsidian vault ROOT (the folder that contains 10_Personal/, etc.). Markdown analysis reports are written into a subfolder below — leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: Trading 212 API Key
Config.Description: T212 API Key. In T212: Settings → API → Create key. Read-only scope is sufficient.

Config.Name: Trading 212 API Secret
Config.Description: T212 API Secret. Generated alongside the API Key in T212 Settings → API. Both Key and Secret are required.

Config.Name: Dashboard Username
Config.Description: Username for Basic Auth login when accessing the dashboard.

Config.Name: Dashboard Password
Config.Description: Password for Basic Auth. Use a strong password — this protects your financial data.

Config.Name: Trusted Networks (proxy bypass)
Config.Description: Comma-separated CIDRs that bypass Basic Auth (e.g. your Authelia/nginx proxy IP or LAN subnet). Example: 192.168.1.0/24,172.17.0.0/16

Config.Name: Report Encryption Key
Config.Description: Optional. If set, Excel reports are password-protected and text reports are encrypted.

Config.Name: Reports Retention Days
Config.Description: Reports older than this many days are deleted automatically on each analysis run.

Config.Name: Obsidian reports folder
Config.Description: Container path where the Obsidian vault is mounted. Must match the volume above (/obsidian). Leave OBSIDIAN vault path empty to disable markdown export.

Config.Name: Obsidian reports subfolder
Config.Description: Folder inside the vault for .md reports (relative to vault root). Created automatically if missing.

Config.Name: Obsidian knowledge enabled
Config.Description: When true, Claude may write atomic notes to 50_Knowledge/notes when it flags durable insight (not on every run).

Config.Name: Obsidian knowledge notes folder
Config.Description: Relative path for new atomic knowledge notes.

Config.Name: Obsidian MOC folder
Config.Description: MOC index folder. App creates/links MOC-investment-analysis and any topic MOCs Claude suggests.

Config.Name: Default investment MOC
Config.Description: Primary MOC for all run reports and knowledge notes. Created automatically if missing.

Config.Name: Analysis Schedule Days
Config.Description: Comma-separated day numbers (0=Mon … 6=Sun). Default: 0,2,5 = Mon/Wed/Sat.

Config.Name: Schedule Enabled
Config.Description: Run automatic T212 sync + analysis on schedule. Manual runs from the dashboard always work.

Config.Name: Schedule Hour
Config.Description: Hour (in Timezone below) for automatic sync + analysis. Default: 3 = 03:00.

Config.Name: Schedule Minute
Config.Description: Minute for the scheduled run. Default: 0.

Config.Name: Backup Retention Days
Config.Description: Backups older than this many days are removed automatically. Backups are written to /data/backups inside the container.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for scheduled sync/analysis (Mon/Wed/Sat 3am by default) and how times are shown on the Sync page. Stored timestamps stay UTC.

Config.Name: Cost Method
Config.Description: Cost basis calculation method: AVCO (average cost, default) or FIFO.

Config.Name: Traefik Enable
Config.Description: Set to true to expose this container via Traefik.

Config.Name: Traefik Rule
Config.Description: Traefik routing rule. Example: Host(`stockanalyser.yourdomain.com`)

Config.Name: Traefik EntryPoints
Config.Description: Traefik entrypoints. Usually 'https' or 'web,websecure'.

Config.Name: Traefik TLS
Config.Description: TLS cert resolver name configured in your Traefik instance.

Config.Name: Traefik Port
Config.Description: Internal container port Traefik forwards to. Must match PORT variable (default 8765).
